data.title: Major fix - 1.1.2
data.content:
🎮 Welcome to %@ 1.1.2!

🎉Major fix:🎉

The launcher could sometimes get stuck loading when installing mods or other resources (not due to network issues). This issue is now fixed.

🔒 Data safety: Please back up your Minecraft saves and launcher data regularly
🐛 Bug reports: If you run into any problems, please report them on our GitHub repository
data.author: Swift Craft Launcher Team
